data.summary: The evidence provided does not sufficiently validate the requirement for multi-channel communication.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the requirement for multi-channel communication (email, SMS, push notification). However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the implementation of these channels. As a result, it is unclear whether the requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence provided for the implementation of multi-channel communication (email, SMS, push notification).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for multi-channel communication
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system supports sending messages via email, SMS, and push notifications.
